title: Over the Moon
writer: Robert E. Sherwood, Lajos Biró, Anthony Pelissier
actors: Merle Oberon, Rex Harrison, Ursula Jeans
plot: Young Jane Benson (Merle Oberon) just about manages to make ends meet running the large family house in Yorkshire. In love with local doctor Freddie Jarvis (Sir Rex Harrison), she suggests they marry, but almost at once finds she ...
